title: Arkanus Ores
description: New ores in minecraft! Wonster, Akram, the POWERFUL Magic Topaz and Emerald Set!
body:
![Arkanus Ores Title Screen](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6ed942f973065ef701c3d7930e5c98f61a1a4b99.png)
BIG UPDATE!!!! NOW IN 1.18.2!! (AND PORTS FOR THE NOT-BETA VERSIONS IN 1.19.2)

 

Hey There! My name is magolor_10 and I'm a YouTuber!

This is my mod, created with MCreator. The first version I upload is the 0.4 because the other versions don't have many things.

But I will upload them for extra. But they're bad. I'm serious. They're really bad.

So, this mod adds 3 new ores sets:

The Magic Topaz set, with a wand and all the tools and armor.

The Magic Akram set, really overpowered and really rare.

The Wonster set, a bit less overpowered then the others.

 

I hope you enjoy this mod.
